message:
🐛 Fix Nightly E2E card stuck in demo mode after sleep/wake (#1382)

The fetcher was returning demo data as a "successful" result when
all API endpoints failed or returned empty. The cache treated this
as fresh data, reset failure counters, and never retried — causing
the card to permanently show demo data until a full page refresh.

Now the fetcher throws on failure instead, so the cache:
1. Increments consecutiveFailures and retries with backoff
2. Keeps showing stale cached live data (stale-while-revalidate)
3. Recovers automatically when the API becomes available again

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
